tasks.text: Commit 4 uncommitted hub files and stress-test approval gateway

tasks.text: Define and track shipping velocity success metrics

Baseline measurement established from last 30 days of activity
Tracking method set up (dashboard, cron report, or weekly summary)

tasks.text: Document financial feature migration boundaries
